events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.

events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Fen Marsh whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
Bloom Peak asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Moss Stone notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Bloom Peak asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Ripple Tide notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Reed Shore notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.

memories.event: Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.
Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.
Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.
